Group.title: Group
Group.description: A group of friends coordinating meetups, with Google Sheets synchronization.

groupId.description: Unique short code or ID for the group

sheetOwnerUid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the sheet owner

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the group was created

members.description: List of group members, including name, color, and timezone

ideas.description: Proposed meetup ideas in the ideas bucket

/groups/{groupId}.description: Main document storing the complete real-time state of a group
